summary: Align app preview dispatch event with the preview repository workflow and verify deployed preview assets by source commit and hado_version.js.
bugClassification: Preview synchronization contract mismatch / stale deployment regression
rootCause: The app workflow sent repository_dispatch event_type app_branch_updated, but the preview repository workflow listens for sync_app_preview. Therefore pushes from the app repository could leave the preview at older content such as Update08.4. The app workflow also notified from any non-main branch even though the preview workflow clones feature/app-3.0.0.0 specifically.
externalizationDecision: No HTML changes. The fix is in the preview notification workflow and validation tooling.
workflowResult: pending-after-push; should now trigger preview repository sync_app_preview dispatch
previewResult: currently stale at Update08.4 before push; must show Update08.9 and matching PREVIEW_SOURCE_COMMIT.txt after workflow success
minimumUserAcceptance: After push to feature/app-3.0.0.0, confirm preview hado_version.js reports Update08.9 and PREVIEW_SOURCE_COMMIT.txt equals the pushed commit SHA.
